creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
https://man.freebsd.org/periodic.conf only mentions master.passwd (plus groups) and Mail aliases

but i see far more stuff in /var/backups

~ $ ls -1 /var/backups/
aliases.bak
boot.da0p1.bak
gpart.da0.bak
gpart.da1.bak
gpart.da2.bak
group.bak
group.bak2
kern.geom.conftxt.bak
kern.geom.conftxt.bak2
master.passwd.bak
master.passwd.bak2
pkg.sql.xz
pkg.sql.xz.1
pkg.sql.xz.2
pkg.sql.xz.3
pkg.sql.xz.4
pkg.sql.xz.5
pkg.sql.xz.6
pkg.sql.xz.7
~ $
